overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a decaying waterfront district with palm trees and abandoned structures, transitioning to views of a futuristic city skyline across the water, then approaching a commercial building with a roller coaster structure, and finally entering a dark covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned waterfront lot with derelict vehicles and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an abandoned lot with palm trees, approaching a derelict black van

entered.detail: tall palm trees scattered throughout the abandoned lot
derelict black van parked on the broken pavement
rusted metal framework of a former sign or gantry spanning the path
low-lying decaying concrete structures with broken windows
tall futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide abandoned lot with scattered palm trees and debris. The camera moves forward past a derelict black van toward a metal overhead structure, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance against a clear golden hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with beach and city skyline view

events.description: transitioning from abandoned lot to waterfront promenade with view of water and distant city

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path with the city skyline visible across the water

entered.detail: metal railing separating the walkway from the beach below
calm water of the bay or ocean with distant industrial structures on the horizon
sandy shoreline with scattered debris and vegetation
small wooden structure on the beach, possibly a lifeguard station or shelter

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront promenade with a metal railing overlooking a sandy beach and calm water. The futuristic city skyline dominates the right side of the view across the water, while palm trees continue to line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with amusement park structure

events.description: crowd density increases as pedestrians appear near the commercial building entrance
approaching the building with large roller coaster structure becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward a commercial building entrance, passing by NPCs gathered near digital billboards and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near a digital advertisement billboard

entered.detail: large commercial structure with illuminated signage and multiple entrances
red metal framework of a roller coaster visible behind the building
illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
derelict vehicle with open doors and visible damage
green industrial dumpsters overflowing with garbage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a commercial building entrance where several NPCs are gathered near digital billboards. An abandoned car and trash dumpsters litter the area, while a large roller coaster structure rises behind the building. The futuristic city skyline remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building structure

events.description: entering a dark covered corridor with artificial lighting replacing natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking into a dimly lit covered walkway beneath the building structure, heading toward the light at the far end

entered.detail: long covered corridor with concrete floor and ceiling extending into the distance
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
sparse overhead lights illuminating the dark corridor
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions into a dark, enclosed concrete walkway beneath the building. Artificial lights provide minimal illumination as the camera moves toward a bright exit at the far end, with the waterfront visible again through the opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a desolate industrial lot toward an expansive waterfront vista under a golden hour sky. It begins by navigating through a wide abandoned area filled with debris and scattered palm trees, passing a derelict black van as it approaches a metal overhead structure. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed feeling of the lot gives way to an open promenade, where the view expands to reveal a metal railing overlooking a sandy beach and calm water. The scene then shifts its focus toward the horizon, where a towering futuristic city skyline dominates the right side of the frame while palm trees continue to line the path on the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered urban plaza into the oppressive shadows of a subterranean passage. It begins by approaching a commercial building entrance where NPCs gather near digital billboards, with an abandoned car and trash dumpsters littering the foreground. As the camera moves forward, a massive roller coaster structure looms over the building while the futuristic city skyline remains visible in the distance. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera enters a dark, enclosed concrete walkway beneath the structure, where minimal artificial lighting replaces the daylight. Finally, the perspective pushes through the gloom toward a bright exit at the far end, revealing the waterfront once more through the opening.
